theme_strategy.name: Cinematic Dark Mode
theme_strategy.description: A high-contrast, immersive dark mode that prioritizes content visibility. Uses 'Soft Blacks' (#09090b) instead of pure black to reduce eye strain, paired with vibrant electric accents for interactivity.
theme_strategy.light_mode_strategy: Minimalist monochrome (White #FFFFFF base, Black text) to mimic gallery spaces.
theme_strategy.dark_mode_strategy: Deep Obsidian (#09090b) base with high-contrast white text and neon accents.

primary.description: Primary brand color for buttons and key actions.

surface.description: Secondary background for cards, sidebars, and inputs.

accent.description: Electric Blue for links/actions, Hot Pink for Likes.

rules: Use 'tracking-tight' for all headings larger than 24px.
Body text should have 'leading-relaxed' for readability.

feed.structure: Mobile-first single column. On desktop, max-width-xl (600px) centered with fixed sidebar navigation.
feed.post_card: w-full border-b border-border/50 pb-6 mb-6 last:border-0

profile.header: flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-6 items-center md:items-start p-6

navigation.mobile: Fixed bottom bar, backdrop-blur-xl, border-t border-white/10
navigation.desktop: Fixed left sidebar, h-screen, w-64, border-r border-white/10

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-lg shadow-primary/20 transition-all active:scale-95

inputs.default: bg-background border border-input focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:border-transparent transition-all

visual_enhancers.gradients: Use subtle radial gradients for backgrounds, strictly avoid linear gradients on buttons.
visual_enhancers.shadows: shadow-lg for floating elements, shadow-none for flat layout items.
micro_interactions: Heart animation: Scale up and bounce on click.
Page transition: Fade in + slight slide up.

rules: Ensure minimum contrast ratio of 4.5:1 for normal text.
All interactive elements must have aria-labels.
Support keyboard navigation for all feeds and modals.

setup: Install required fonts: Outfit and Manrope via Google Fonts.
Configure tailwind.config.js with the specified color palette and fonts.
Override index.css layer base to set the new CSS variables for dark/light mode.
implementation: Build the Feed first using the 'feed' layout strategy.
Use 'lucide-react' for all icons (Heart, MessageCircle, Share2, etc.).
Implement the Sidebar for desktop and BottomNav for mobile.
Ensure all images use 'object-cover' and have proper aspect ratios (square or 4:5).
universal_guidelines: Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
All interactive elements must include a data-testid attribute.
NEVER use transparent backgrounds without a blur or scrim.
